Manage authentication (LLM provider credentials)

Usage:
  opendbx auth [command]

Available Commands:
  login       Log in to an LLM provider
  logout      Log out / clear credentials
  status      Show current authentication status

Flags:
  -h, --help   help for auth

Global Flags:
  -d, --debug string        Enable debug mode with optional category filtering (e.g., "api,hooks" or "!1p,!file")
      --debug-file string   Write debug logs to a specific file path (implicitly enables debug mode)
      --verbose             Override verbose mode setting from config

Use "opendbx auth [command] --help" for more information about a command.
